{
  "judge_id": "Judge-1",

  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent identifies one prior work and articulates the delta, but does not map against the nearest 3-5 works or identify sharp vs rhetorical delta.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flags one missing citation (NeuroCard year), but audits every load-bearing citation is not performed.",
    "RX.1": "The agent flags uncertainty for one clearly out-of-reach claim (the 'first' claim), but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d).",
    "RX.4": "The output is harm-free but with one minor regression (year of NeuroCard citation).",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is not annotated with source and reason, but major rewrites are traced."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.9,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1,
    "RX.4": 0.8,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}
